howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Get started in three simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From sign-up to live chat in minutes. No complex setup, no coding expertise required.

step1.title: Create Your Account
step1.description: Sign up and complete our guided onboarding. Configure your AI agent's personality, knowledge base, and response preferences in just a few clicks.

step2.title: Embed the Script
step2.description: Copy and paste a single line of code into your website. Our lightweight script loads asynchronously and won't affect your page performance.

step3.title: Customize & Launch
step3.description: Fine-tune your chat widget's appearance to match your brand. Train your AI agent with your FAQs and documentation, then go live instantly.

q1.question: What is ChatService?
q1.answer: ChatService is an AI-powered customer support platform that lets you deploy intelligent chat agents on your website. Our agents understand context, learn from your knowledge base, and provide human-like responses to your customers 24/7.

q2.question: How does the AI work?
q2.answer: Our AI is built on state-of-the-art large language models fine-tuned for customer support. You train it with your FAQs, documentation, and past conversations. It continuously learns and improves from interactions while staying within your defined guidelines.

q3.question: Is my data secure?
q3.answer: Absolutely. We use bank-grade AES-256 encryption for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit. We're SOC2 Type II and GDPR compliant. Your data is never used to train our models, and you can request full deletion at any time.

q4.question: What integrations do you support?
q4.answer: ChatService integrates with Slack, Zendesk, HubSpot, Salesforce, Intercom, WhatsApp, and more. We also offer a REST API and webhooks so you can connect with any tool in your stack.

q5.question: Can I try it before committing?
q5.answer: Yes! Our Free plan lets you run up to 100 conversations per month at no cost. No credit card required. You can upgrade to Pro anytime to unlock unlimited conversations and advanced features.

q6.question: Does it support multiple languages?
q6.answer: Yes. ChatService supports over 50 languages out of the box. Your AI agent can automatically detect the customer's language and respond accordingly, making it perfect for global businesses.

cta.title: Ready to transform your customer experience?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses using ChatService to deliver instant, intelligent support around the clock.

highlights.title: The complete platform for AI support agents
highlights.description: ChatService1 is designed for building AI support agents that solve your customers' hardest problems while improving business outcomes.

card1.title: Purpose-built for LLMs
card1.description: Language models with reasoning capabilities for effective responses to complex queries.

card2.title: Designed for simplicity
card2.description: Create, manage, and deploy AI Agents easily, even without technical skills.

card3.title: Engineered for security
card3.description: Enjoy peace of mind with robust encryption and strict compliance standards.

bentoFeatures.title: Build the perfect customer-facing AI agent
bentoFeatures.description: ChatService1 gives you all the tools you need to train your perfect AI agent and connect it to your systems.

card1.title: Sync with real-time data
card1.description: Connect your agent to systems like order management tools, CRMs, and more to seamlessly access data ranging from order details to active subscriptions and beyond.
card1.userMessage: What's the status of my order?

card2.title: Take actions on your systems
card2.description: Configure actions that your agent can perform within your systems or through one of our integrations, like updating a customer's subscription or changing their address.

card3.title: Compare AI models
card3.description: Experiment with various models and configurations to make sure you have the best setup for your use case.
card3.userMessage: I'm not sure which plan is right for me. Can you help?

card4.title: Smart escalation
card4.description: Give your agent instructions in natural language on when to escalate queries to a human agents.
card4.userMessage: Hey, I would like a refund

card5.title: Advanced reporting
card5.description: Gain insights and optimize agent performance with detailed analytics.

integrations.title: Works with your tools
integrations.description: Integrate diverse data sources to enrich your agent's knowledge and capabilities.

mini1.title: API
mini1.description: APIs, client libraries, and components to deeply integrate support into your product.

mini2.title: Whitelabel
mini2.description: Remove any ChatService1 branding from the chat widget.

mini3.title: Always improving
mini3.description: Syncs with your systems and learns from previous interactions.
